# Daily Report — 2026-05-20

## Task Completed
Added `create_knowledge_article` tool to `knowledge_base.py`. Unlike the existing `create_article`, this tool:
- Accepts knowledge base and category by **name or sys_id**, auto-resolving names via lookup (skips the lookup entirely when a 32-char hex sys_id is supplied, saving round-trips)
- Exposes additional ServiceNow fields: `author`, `valid_to` (expiry date), `flagged`, `disable_commenting`, `disable_suggesting`
- Supports an optional `publish=true` flag that sets `workflow_state=published` in the creation POST, eliminating the need for a separate publish call
- Added `_resolve_kb_sys_id` helper alongside the existing `_resolve_category_sys_id`
- Registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, `tool_packages.yaml` (`knowledge_author` + `full` packages)

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1132
- Coverage: 91%
- All passing: yes

## Security
System-level dependency advisories only (pyjwt, setuptools, urllib3, wheel) — no project code vulnerabilities.

- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — import + `__all__` entry
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — import + tool definition
